actions.value: Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our partners. Please reach out directly to Simplex support to ask questions about recent order, your verification status, or to update any personal information on file with them: support@simplex.com

Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our partners. Please reach out directly to Simplex support to ask questions about recent order, your verification status, or to update any personal information on file with them: support@simplex.com
